_meta.name: ALM r12 FSDP B1+B2 unblock — libhxnccl.so + layer collectives + fsdp_shard wire (2026-04-20)
_meta.goal: Resolve r11 FSDP B2 (layer-granularity collectives) so r12 multi-rank training has a complete hexa-native collective surface end-to-end (init→broadcast→reduce→destroy).

verdict_rationale: B1 surface (init/barrier/destroy/all_reduce_loss) was already landed in v1.0 of this JSON. B2 surface (layer collectives) is now landed: lib/hxnccl/hxnccl.c gained 4 new exports (reduce_scatter_f32, allgather_f32, allreduce_bf16, plus the handle-based init/free pair train_alm_lora.hexa already extern-decl'd), self/native/hxccl_linux.c gained 1 leaf helper (hxnccl_internal_allreduce_bf16_dev) under both Linux NCCL and Mac stub branches, training/nccl_ffi.hexa got 2 new array-based layer collective entry-points (nccl_broadcast_layer_tensors, nccl_reduce_scatter_layer_tensors) plus a device-pointer loss-sync overload (nccl_all_reduce_loss_dev), and training/fsdp_shard.hexa was rewritten to call those array-entries with the actual GpuLayer / GpuLayerGrad device pointers (8 tensors per layer × Wq/Wk/Wv/Wo/Wff1/Wff2/ga/gf). Single-rank smoke 15/15 PASS (was 8/8 before B2 surface). Linux Day-2 NCCL path verified compile-clean against mock cuda_runtime.h + nccl.h (real link deferred to runpod). 2-rank live H100 SXM smoke remains DEFERRED per feedback_h100_free_use to avoid spinning a $5.98/hr pod for a 30-min ABI verification — confidence is HIGH because both the Mac stub (Family A no-op + Family B identity) and the Linux NCCL #ifdef branches now have full coverage.

files_modified.purpose: Added B2 layer-collective surface (hxnccl_reduce_scatter_f32, hxnccl_allgather_f32, hxnccl_allreduce_bf16) + handle-based init/free aliases (hxnccl_init device_count, hxnccl_free) so train_alm_lora.hexa's extern decls resolve. bf16 path routes through new leaf hxnccl_internal_allreduce_bf16_dev in hxccl_linux.c (only TU with <nccl.h> include).

Added hxnccl_internal_allreduce_bf16_dev leaf in BOTH Linux HXCCL_NCCL branch (real ncclAllReduce ncclBfloat16 ncclSum + cudaStreamSynchronize) and Mac stub branch (world=1 identity, world>1 -1). Keeps hxnccl.c free of <nccl.h> includes.
Extended single-rank smoke from 8 → 15 checks. Adds allreduce_f32, broadcast_f32, reduce_scatter_f32, allgather_f32, allreduce_bf16, hxnccl_init(1), hxnccl_free(h).

Added 2 new extern decls (hxnccl_reduce_scatter_f32, hxnccl_allgather_f32). Added 2 new array-based layer entry-points (nccl_broadcast_layer_tensors, nccl_reduce_scatter_layer_tensors) that loop over the 8 GpuLayer tensors. Added device-ptr overload nccl_all_reduce_loss_dev. Old nccl_broadcast_layer / nccl_reduce_scatter_layer kept as legacy stubs returning NCCL_TODO_RC (callers migrate to *_tensors).

fsdp_all_gather_params now builds the [Wq,Wk,Wv,Wo,Wff1,Wff2,ga,gf] device-pointer array + [D*D,D*D,D*D,D*D,D*FF,FF*D,D,D] count array and calls nccl_broadcast_layer_tensors. fsdp_reduce_scatter_grads does the same for GpuLayerGrad [dWq..dgf] via nccl_reduce_scatter_layer_tensors (dense-grad path, in-place ncclAllReduce SUM).

hxnccl_reduce_scatter_f32.src_dst: hxnccl.c → hxccl_reduce_scatter (Family A) → ncclReduceScatter ncclFloat ncclSum

nccl_all_reduce_loss_dev.src_dst: nccl_ffi.hexa → hxnccl_allreduce_f32 op=AVG count=1 (caller stages loss into 4-byte device buffer)

hxnccl_init.purpose: device_count entry expected by train_alm_lora.hexa; reads LOCAL_RANK env, calls hxnccl_init_world internally, echoes handle

linux_nccl_compile_with_mock.note: Mock cuda_runtime.h + nccl.h (matching real ABI) used for compile-only verification. Both TUs link-clean — bf16 path resolves hxnccl_internal_allreduce_bf16_dev across TUs as designed. Real link against libnccl.so + libcudart.so deferred to runpod build.

two_rank_h100_smoke.rationale: Requires H100 SXM 2-GPU pod. Estimated cost: $5.98/hr × 0.5h smoke = $3 (pod spin + nvcc + libhxnccl build with -DHXNCCL_WITH_NCCL=ON + 2-rank init + barrier + allreduce + broadcast + reduce_scatter + allgather + bf16 sweep + destroy). Deferred to next session per feedback_h100_free_use (idle GPU = waste); B2 unblock target was the FFI surface + fsdp_shard wire, not the multi-rank live test. Confidence the live test will pass: HIGH — every NCCL call site mirrors the standard nccl-tests idiom and the Mac stub demonstrates the ABI surface compiles + dlopens + reports correct cached state for all 15 entry-points.

launch_plan.rendezvous: HXCCL_UNIQUE_ID_FILE=/tmp/hxccl_uid_2 (default), shared via /tmp on intra-node SXM
smoke_pattern: Both ranks: init_world → barrier → allreduce_f32 (verify SUM result × 2) → broadcast_f32 (verify rank 1 receives rank 0 value) → reduce_scatter_f32 → allgather_f32 → bf16 sweep → destroy
verify_steps: rank 1 buffer after broadcast == rank 0 input
every rank buffer after allreduce == sum of all-rank inputs
launch_plan.blocking_question_for_owner: Approve pod spin for 2-rank live verify? (Within feedback_h100_authorized 2-pod cap; previous pods 87xsc + hhz are EXITED.)

compliance.hexa_first_evidence: Edited only .c (hxnccl.c, hxccl_linux.c, smoke.c) + .hexa (nccl_ffi.hexa, fsdp_shard.hexa) + .json (this state). No .py / .rs / .sh authored.
compliance.h100_evidence: No new pod spun for 2-rank live test; compile/syntax/ABI verified locally on Mac instead.
compliance.no_version_evidence: Filenames carry date stamp 20260420; no v2/v3 in filename. v1.1 schema bump is inside the JSON only.
compliance.troubleshoot_evidence: Found: train_alm_lora.hexa had its own extern surface (hxnccl_init device_count, hxnccl_allreduce_bf16, hxnccl_free) DIFFERENT from the v1.0 hxnccl.c export set (hxnccl_init_world, hxnccl_destroy_world). Fix: hxnccl.c now exports BOTH surfaces via aliases — handle-based + handle-less coexist on g_hxnccl_handle. Inline comment recorded in hxnccl.c above 'Process-global handle' section.

next_steps.description: Recommended: 30-min H100 SXM 2-GPU smoke to verify ncclCommInitRank file-rendezvous + ncclAllReduce + ncclBroadcast + ncclReduceScatter + ncclAllGather + ncclBfloat16 on real hardware before r12 launch. Smoke binary needs a 2-rank variant of lib/hxnccl/smoke.c (~50 LOC, accepts argv rank+world).

After 2-rank verify (or skipping it on confidence): r12 fresh-from-step-0 launch on H100 SXM 2-GPU, FULL_SHARD + Qwen2DecoderLayer wrap + BACKWARD_PRE prefetch + SHARDED_STATE_DICT + NCCL_P2P_LEVEL=NVL. Trainer is training/train_alm_lora.hexa with --world_size 2 --rank 0/1. fsdp_shard.hexa now exposes fsdp_all_gather_params + fsdp_reduce_scatter_grads as no-stub multi-rank.

Optional: migrate train_alm_lora.hexa step-block AllReduce call site (currently uses dummy buf=0 since hexa-side grads are CPU arrays) to the device-pointer flow once hxqwen14b Day-2 ABI returns bf16 device pointers. Until then the wire is a no-op call that exercises the NCCL handle.

cites: training/nccl_ffi.hexa (array-based layer entry-points + device-ptr loss sync — +95 LOC)
training/fsdp_shard.hexa (fsdp_all_gather_params + fsdp_reduce_scatter_grads now wire array collectives — +30 LOC)
memory:feedback_hexa_lists_pbv (relevant to fsdp_shard array build pattern)
